# PUBLICATIONS

Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2023. “Post-Neoliberalism and External Financial Liberalization: Comparing Left-Wing and Right-Wing Populism.” Government and Opposition, 58(3): 535-555.

Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2023. “Post-neoliberalism and capital flow management in Latin America: assessing the role of social forces.” Journal of International Relations and Development, 26: 30-60.

Pedro Perfeito da Silva, and Julia Bandeira. 2023. “Center-Left Parties and Developmental Regimes in Chile and Mexico: assessing the role of democracy.” Latin American Perspectives, forthcoming.

Luiza Peruffo, Pedro Perfeito da Silva, and Andre Cunha. 2023. “Global Financial Crisis and Capital Flows Management in Brazil: Towards a Polanyian Approach.” Journal of Economic Issues, 57(1): 275-300.

Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2022. “The reregulation of capital flows in Latin America: assessing the impact of post-neoliberal governments.” Review of International Political Economy, 29(5): 1497-1524.

Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2022. “The Political Economy of Intermediate Capital Account Regimes: a fuzzy-set Qualitative Comparative Analysis”. Studies in Comparative International Development, 57: 497–524.

Marina Marques, and Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2022. “The role of institutions: a cross

country analysis of renminbi trading in foreign exchange markets.” China & World Economy, 30(3): 42-74.

Pedro Perfeito da Silva, and Julia Bandeira. 2021. “The Political Economy of Neoliberalism in Brazil: Towards a Polanyian Approach.” Third World Quarterly,42(6): 1176-1195.

André Cunha, Daniela Prates, and Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2020. “External Financial Liberalization and Macroeconomic Performance in Emerging Countries: an empirical evaluation of the Brazilian case.” Development & Change, 51(5): 1225- 1245.

Eliane Araújo, Elisângela Araújo, Mateus Fonseca, Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2020.“Inflation targeting regime and global financial cycle: an assessment for the Brazilian economy.” PSL Quarterly Review, 73 (292): 27-49.

André Cunha, Luiza Peruffo, and Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2020. “Finance and Development after the Global Financial Crisis: the Brazilian Experience.” In: Economic policies for Development: beyond the millennium goals, edited by Julimar Bichara. New York: Nova Science Publishers.

André Cunha, Andres Ferrari, and Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2019. “Global financial cycle and Brazil’s financial integration.” International Review of Applied Economics, 33(6): 829-851.

André Cunha, Marcos Lélis, Andres Ferrari, and Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2017. “The Brazilian Credit Market During the Great Recession.” In: The Brazilian Economy since the Great Financial Crisis of 2007/2008, edited by Philip Arestis, Carolina Baltar and Daniela Prates. London: Palgrave Macmillan.

Fernando Sebben, and Pedro Perfeito da Silva. 2016. “As políticas industrial e infraestrutural durante o Governo Lula: implicações e desafios da adoção domodelo do Estado Logístico para o Brasil.” Carta Internacional, 11(1): 63-90.
